name: pg-aiguide
description: MCP server and Claude Code plugin providing AI-optimized PostgreSQL expertise. Offers semantic search across the official PostgreSQL manual, curated best-practice skills, and TimescaleDB extension docs to help AI coding tools generate better PostgreSQL code.

findings_summary.notes: Strong organizational repo from Timescale (established PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB company). Apache-2.0 license. SECURITY.md present. Actively maintained with recent commits. Provides read-only documentation and search functionality with no privileged access. Low risk profile.
